message:
🐛 Guard namespace access API behind admin role check

- Skip /api/namespaces/{name}/access call for non-admin users
- Show meaningful permission message in access panel for non-admins
- Improve error handling to surface 403 messages instead of generic failure
- Hide Grant Access and Revoke buttons for non-admin users
- Add i18n keys for namespace permission messages

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:

     "subjectServiceAccount": "Service Account",
-    "rolesNamespaceScoped": "These roles are scoped to this namespace only - not cluster-wide."
+    "rolesNamespaceScoped": "These roles are scoped to this namespace only - not cluster-wide.",
+    "accessManagement": "Access Management",
+    "adminAccessRequired": "Admin access required to view namespace details",
+    "fetchAccessFailed": "Failed to fetch namespace access",
+    "adminRequiredForAccess": "Admin access required to view role bindings",
+    "noRoleBindings": "No role bindings found"
   },
